name: VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS INC
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. is a holding company and one of the world's leading providers of communications, technology, information, and streaming products and services. Operating through two segments—Verizon Consumer Group and Verizon Business Group—it offers wireless services, fiber-optic and copper-based wireline broadband, FWA broadband via 5G/4G LTE, IoT connectivity, managed network services, security services, and video services to consumers, businesses, government entities, and carriers across the U.S. and in more than 180 countries.

products.name: Postpaid Wireless Service
products.description: Monthly wireless access plans for Consumer and Business customers billed one month in advance.

products.name: Prepaid Wireless Service
products.description: Wireless service for Consumer customers without credit verification, paid in advance.

products.name: Fixed Wireless Access (FWA) Broadband
products.description: Fixed broadband internet access via 5G or 4G LTE networks for home and business customers.

products.name: Fios Internet
products.description: Residential and business fiber-optic broadband internet service offered over 100% fiber-optic network.

products.name: Fios Video
products.description: Residential video service including content, streaming options, VOD, and DVR capabilities.

products.name: Wireline Voice Services
products.description: Local and long distance voice services for residential, business, and wholesale customers.

products.name: IoT Connectivity Solutions
products.description: Internet of Things connectivity services for Business segment customers.

products.name: Managed Network Services
products.description: Security and managed network services offered to enterprise and public sector customers.

products.name: Corporate Networking Solutions
products.description: Advanced communication and corporate networking products for Business customers.

products.name: Device Protection
products.description: Non-connectivity consumer service offering device protection for wireless customers.

products.name: Cloud Storage
products.description: Non-connectivity consumer service offering cloud storage solutions.

products.name: Smartphones and Handsets
products.description: Various smartphones and other handsets sold to Consumer and Business customers.

products.name: Wireless-Enabled Internet Devices
products.description: Tablets and other wireless-enabled connected devices including smart watches sold to customers.

products.name: vRAN Infrastructure
products.description: Industry-leading virtualized radio access network infrastructure leveraging Open RAN solutions.

products.name: Private Networks
products.description: Private network solutions offered as part of advanced network services portfolio.

partnerships.description: Partnerships to enhance off-grid emergency and text messaging services via satellite coverage extension.
Wholesale network access agreements allowing MVNOs to resell wireless service under their own brands.
Relationships with high-profile national retailers to sell Verizon wireless and wireline products and services.
Business segment distribution partnerships for integrated mobility services and business solution fulfillment.
